description: A comprehensive hotel booking system that allows guests to search for rooms, make reservations, and manage their bookings. Hotel staff can manage room inventory, view bookings, and check in guests. System administrators can oversee hotel settings and user accounts.

fr.title: User Account Registration
fr.description: Guests can create a new account using their email, password, and personal details.

fr.title: User Login/Logout
fr.description: Registered users (Guests, Staff, Admin) can log in with their credentials and log out.

fr.title: Room Search and Filter
fr.description: Guests can search for available rooms based on dates, room type, and number of guests. They can filter results by price and amenities.

fr.title: View Room Details
fr.description: Guests can view detailed information about a specific room, including photos, description, price, and available amenities.

fr.title: Create Booking
fr.description: Logged-in guests can select a room and dates to create a reservation, providing payment information.

fr.title: View Personal Bookings
fr.description: Guests can view a list of their upcoming and past bookings.

fr.title: Cancel Booking
fr.description: Guests can cancel an upcoming booking, subject to the cancellation policy.

fr.title: Staff Dashboard
fr.description: Hotel staff can view a dashboard summarizing current occupancy, upcoming check-ins, and recent bookings.

fr.title: Staff - Manage Bookings
fr.description: Hotel staff can view all bookings, search for a specific booking, and update its status (e.g., check-in, check-out).

fr.title: Staff - Manage Room Inventory
fr.description: Hotel staff can update room availability, pricing, and details for each room type.

fr.title: Admin - User Management
fr.description: Administrators can view, create, edit, and deactivate user accounts (including staff accounts).

nfr.description: The user interface must be fully responsive and usable on devices from 320px (mobile) to 1920px (desktop).
The application must comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards to be accessible to users with disabilities.
All sensitive data, including passwords and payment information, must be encrypted.

use_cases.title: Book a Room
use_cases.flow: Search for rooms -> View details -> Select room -> Provide payment -> Confirm booking.

use_cases.title: Check-in a Guest
use_cases.flow: Search for booking by name or confirmation number -> Verify details -> Mark guest as checked-in.
